title: Knowledge Pack
description: Bounded subset of the knowledge base built for a single analysis. Consumed by M2.9 specialist agents and M2.11 orchestrator; written by M2.8 `knowledge build-pack`. Per the copyright contract, source bodies never appear here — only rule_id + source_id + our own summary + (optional) short verbatim excerpt.

knowledge_pack_id.description: Stable identifier — usually `<project_id>__<short hash of problem_context>`.

retrieval_mode.description: How retrieval was performed: M2.7 keyword-only, M2.8 embeddings, future hybrid.

problem_context_ref.description: Compact echo of the ProblemContext that produced this pack (project_id + analysis_scope + topology hash).

topics.description: Topic tags inferred from problem_context — drives downstream agent dispatch.

snippets.description: Redacted retrieved snippets safe to send to an LLM.

summary.description: Our own concise summary of the rule. Always safe to send.

excerpt.description: Optional ≤200-char verbatim excerpt; present only when source.allowed_use permits.

recommended_sweeps.description: Variant-engine hints derived from the retrieved rules (consumed by M2.9 / M2.10).

typical_values.description: Pre-extracted rule-of-thumb values from the snippets.

limitations.description: Caveats carried forward into the report.
